emotionalAnchor: This page is not a gift… it is the quiet memory of all the soft moments we share.

letter.opening: My Fay Fay 💖, my chargie, my moama…
paragraphs: On this June 20, every beat in my chest feels like a celebration because the world became brighter the day you were born.
Your birthday is not just another date. It is the story of the woman who brings warmth, light, and grace into every room she enters.
I love the way your laughter sounds like music, the way your kindness turns ordinary moments into memories, and the way your eyes shine with a quiet courage that takes my breath away.
You make even the smallest moments feel extraordinary: a morning text, a shared smile, a gentle hand held without thinking. Those are the pieces of us I treasure most.

At twenty, you are already more beautiful, more strong, and more alive than words can hold. Today is for celebrating every part of you — your heart, your soul, your dreams, and the love you give so freely.
I am proud of who you are, endlessly grateful for the way you love, and excited for all the chapters ahead. This year belongs to you, and I want it to feel as special as you make my life feel.
I promise to keep celebrating you, to keep lifting you, and to keep loving you with a tenderness that honors how incredible you really are.
Happy birthday, my Fay Fay. Today the whole world feels a little more magical because it is yours.
prayers: I pray that God continues to surround you with peace that feels like a warm hand on your shoulder, even when the world is noisy.
I pray your heart remains tender to the good gifts and able to recognize wisdom in quiet moments.
I pray you are guided toward a life that honors your soul and brings you closer to the meaning you were made for.
careerGoals: To finish civil engineering at Fourah Bay College with the same quiet strength and focus you bring to every challenge.
To build a future in engineering where you design strong, beautiful spaces that protect and uplift the people who use them.
To carry your faith, your care, and your practical brilliance into a career that leaves a real mark on the world.
wishes: I wish you mornings that feel soft and full of possibility, with a heart that knows you are enough.
I wish you the courage to choose the beautiful truth over the loudest path.
I wish this year gives you quiet victories, gentle healing, and laughter that comes from a place of freedom.

timeline.description: A quiet beginning that turned into something steady and warm.
The first conversation felt easy, like it already made sense.
Small moments became the ones I wanted to keep forever.
A day that still feels warm whenever we think about it.
Comfortable, honest, and still choosing each other each day.

traits.name: Caring
traits.description: You notice when something's wrong before anyone says a word.

traits.name: Resilient
traits.description: You've been through things that would break most people. You didn't break.

traits.name: Funny
traits.description: Not trying-to-be-funny. Actually funny. Effortlessly.

traits.name: Thoughtful
traits.description: You remember the details that matter.

traits.name: Loyal
traits.description: When you're in someone's corner, you're all in.

traits.name: Quietly Strong
traits.description: You don't announce your strength. You just carry things.

traits.name: Curious
traits.description: You ask questions about the world that most people walk past.

traits.name: Gentle
traits.description: There's a softness in how you move through the world.

traits.name: Determined
traits.description: When you've made up your mind, nothing moves you.

traits.name: Expressive
traits.description: Your face tells the whole story before you say a thing.

traits.name: Nostalgic
traits.description: You hold onto the beautiful things. You don't let them fade.

traits.name: Creative
traits.description: You see things differently. Always have.

traits.name: Emotional Intelligence
traits.description: You understand people deeply — sometimes better than they understand themselves.

traits.name: Infectious Energy
traits.description: Rooms feel different when you're in them.

traits.name: Perceptive
traits.description: Nothing gets past you. Nothing.

traits.name: Stubborn
traits.description: You know what you believe. You don't let people talk you out of your truth.

traits.name: Beautiful
traits.description: Not just the obvious kind. The kind that comes from the inside and leaks out.

traits.name: Patient
traits.description: With others. Less so with yourself — work on that.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You try things. You move toward what scares you.

traits.name: 20 at 20
traits.description: You are twenty years of becoming. And you're only getting started.

nicknames.name: Chicken
nicknames.meaning: A playful comfort joke between us.

nicknames.name: Tesoro
nicknames.meaning: Italian for treasure. Because that's what you are.

nicknames.name: Corazón
nicknames.meaning: My heart. In the most literal sense.

dreams: To find a career where your empathy is a superpower, not a burden.
To travel and collect quiet mornings in cities you've never been to.
To build a life that feels as safe and warm as you make others feel.
promises: I will always be in your corner, even when you doubt yourself.
I will listen when you need quiet, and speak up when you need a voice.
I will keep choosing you, every single day.
aspirations.reminder: The world has not yet seen what you are capable of. Neither have you. But you will.
